psalm-98-1.verse:
O sing to the Lord a new song,
  For He has done wonderful things,
  His right hand and His holy arm have gained the victory for Him.
psalm-98-1.prayer: Lord, help me sing a new song to You because You have done wonderful things. Fill my heart with fresh praise and gratitude.

psalm-98-2.verse:
The Lord has made known His salvation;
  He has revealed His righteousness in the sight of the nations.
psalm-98-2.prayer: Father, thank You for making Your salvation known. Help my life reflect Your righteousness and saving grace.

psalm-98-3.verse:
He has remembered His lovingkindness and His faithfulness to the house of Israel;
  All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
psalm-98-3.prayer: Lord, thank You for remembering Your lovingkindness and faithfulness. Help me trust that Your promises never fail.

psalm-98-4.verse:
Shout joyfully to the Lord, all the earth;
  Break forth and sing for joy and sing praises.
psalm-98-4.prayer: Father, let my heart shout joyfully to You. Fill my life with worship that honors Your greatness.

psalm-98-5.verse:
Sing praises to the Lord with the lyre,
  With the lyre and the sound of melody.
psalm-98-5.prayer: Lord, help me praise You with music, joy, and sincerity. Let my worship come from a grateful heart.

psalm-98-6.verse:
With trumpets and the sound of the horn
  Shout joyfully before the King, the Lord.
psalm-98-6.prayer: Father, teach me to rejoice before You as King. Let my life celebrate Your rule with gladness and reverence.

psalm-98-7.verse:
Let the sea roar and all it contains,
  The world and those who dwell in it.
psalm-98-7.prayer: Lord, let all creation remind me of Your glory. Help me join the earth in praising Your name.

psalm-98-8.verse:
Let the rivers clap their hands,
  Let the mountains sing together for joy
psalm-98-8.prayer: Father, let the rivers clap and the mountains sing in my heart. Awaken joy and wonder as I behold Your works.

psalm-98-9.prayer: Lord, You judge the earth with righteousness and fairness. Help me live faithfully, with hope in Your justice and truth.

psalm-98-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your salvation, righteousness, lovingkindness, and faithfulness. Teach me to sing a new song of praise and rejoice before You as King. Let my heart be filled with worship, my life reflect Your goodness, and my hope rest in Your righteous judgment. May everything in me join creation in declaring Your glory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
